commands.payload:
ADTModelGenerator 5.2.0+d899ae266b3f16c5c9b8ca81882dae6047939c2d
Copyright © 2022-2025 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  build       Generates an Azure digital twins model file with ScaleOut
              real-time digital twin component based on ScaleOut real-time
              digital twin definition.

  validate    Validates an Azure digital twin model.

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

  version     Display version information.

result.stderr:
ADTModelGenerator 5.2.0+d899ae266b3f16c5c9b8ca81882dae6047939c2d
Copyright © 2022-2025 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.

  -m, --adt_model_id                Required. The name of an Azure digital twin
                                    model identifier.

  -d, --display_name                The Azure digital twin model display name.

  -z, --rtdt_zip_file_path          Required. The path to a ScaleOut real-time
                                    digital twin model zip file that contains
                                    either the model.json or appsettings.json
                                    file as well as all the binaries used by a
                                    real-time digital twin assembly. This zip
                                    file will be updated at the end of a
                                    successful run to add the
                                    'AzureDigitalTwinModelName' parameter with
                                    the 'adt_model_id' value.

  -a, --adt_model_json_file_path    Required. The path to the output JSON file
                                    that contains both Azure digital twin model
                                    definition file with embedded ScaleOut
                                    component.

  --help                            Display this help screen.

  --version                         Display version information.

staticCommands.name: build
staticCommands.description: Generates an Azure digital twins model file with ScaleOut real-time digital twin component based on ScaleOut real-time digital twin definition.

options.description: The name of an Azure digital twin model identifier.
The path to the output JSON file that contains both Azure digital twin model definition file with embedded ScaleOut component.

The path to a ScaleOut real-time digital twin model zip file that contains either the model.json or appsettings.json file as well as all the binaries used by a real-time digital twin assembly. This zip file will be updated at the end of a successful run to add the 'AzureDigitalTwinModelName' parameter with the 'adt_model_id' value.
The Azure digital twin model display name.

staticCommands.name: validate
staticCommands.description: Validates an Azure digital twin model.

options.description: The path to an Azure digital twin model file.
